form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at this track on February 6 over 1400m, neck behind Maengnyong with 55.5kg at $6.50. Second-up favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck at this track March 13 over 1400m defeating Sincheon First carrying 57kg at $3.30. Found her best form now. Will take beating.
